name: Rhubarb Ripple
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cut rhubarb in a round baking dish (2-1/2 quarts) with the cinnamon stick.
2. Combine 1 cup sugar with 2 tbsp flour and scatter over the fruit.
3. Pour on water and add red food coloring if desired to the proper shade.
4. Bake in a hot oven for 25 minutes.
5. In a bowl, stir together 1 cup flour, 3 tablespoons sugar, baking powder, salt, allspice, and cinnamon.
6. With two knives, cut in shortening until crumbs form.
7. Whisk egg with 2 tablespoons milk. Add pecans to the dry ingredients and mix in the milk mixture, stirring into a soft dough.
8. Turn out onto a floured board and knead gently 12 times.
9. Pat into a circle.
10. Cut into wedges and place on the baked fruit.
11. Brush with beaten egg.
